items.q: The character Vittorio De Sica appears in Citizen Kane.
items.explanation: Vittorio De Sica appears in Bicycle Thieves, not Citizen Kane.

items.q: The character Akira Kurosawa appears in Seven Samurai.
items.explanation: Akira Kurosawa is a key character in Seven Samurai.

items.q: Which movie features the character Andrei Tarkovsky?
items.explanation: Andrei Tarkovsky is associated with Stalker.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Yasujiro Ozu.
items.explanation: Yasujiro Ozu is strongly linked to Tokyo Story.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Stanley Kubrick.
items.explanation: Stanley Kubrick is strongly linked to 2001: A Space Odyssey.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Vertigo?
items.explanation: Alfred Hitchcock is one of the defining characters in Vertigo.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Sergio Leone.
items.a: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly
items.explanation: Sergio Leone is strongly linked to The Good, the Bad and the Ugly.

items.q: Name the movie that features the character Florian Henckel von Donnersmarck.
items.explanation: Florian Henckel von Donnersmarck is strongly linked to The Lives of Others.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Parasite?
items.explanation: Bong Joon-ho is one of the defining characters in Parasite.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the movie Chungking Express?
items.explanation: Wong Kar-wai is one of the defining characters in Chungking Express.
